ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, One-Day Internationals, Twenty20) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "team1" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "match_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (e.g., team1 won, team2 won, draw) */,
  "match_version" INTEGER /* Version of the match data */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "match_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the match result (e.g., margin of victory, method of victory) */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "match_series" TEXT /* Name of the series or tournament the match is part of */,
  "match_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the series or tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the innings belongs to */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Number of the innings (1 or 2) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team batting in the innings */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team in the innings */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled by the team in the innings */,
  "inning_status" TEXT /* Status of the innings (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "inning_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the innings */,
  "inning_extras" INTEGER /* Total extras ( wides, no-balls, etc. ) in the innings */,
  "inning_declared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the innings was declared by the batting team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_profile" TEXT /* A brief profile or biography of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "player_batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "player_bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings the statistic belongs to */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "balls_played" INTEGER /* Total balls played by the player in the match */,
  "dots" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls played by the player in the match */,
  "ones" INTEGER /* Number of singles scored by the player in the match */,
  "twos" INTEGER /* Number of twos scored by the player in the match */,
  "threes" INTEGER /* Number of threes scored by the player in the match */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours scored by the player in the match */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes scored by the player in the match */,
  "player_position" INTEGER /* Position of the player in the batting order */,
  "strikerate" REAL /* Batting strike rate */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in the match */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings */,
  "runouts" INTEGER /* Number of runouts involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings the statistic belongs to */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Total balls bowled by the player in the match */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "runs_given" INTEGER /* Total runs given by the player in the match */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Bowling economy rate */,
  "dot_balls" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled */,
  "no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no-balls bowled */,
  "wides_runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored from wides */,
  "no_balls_runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored from no-balls */,
  "byes" INTEGER /* Number of byes */,
  "leg_byes" INTEGER /* Number of leg byes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wickets" (
  "wicket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wicket */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the wicket belongs to */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings the wicket belongs to */,
  "wicket_method" TEXT /* Method of the wicket (e.g., caught, bowled) */,
  "batsman" TEXT /* Name of the batsman who got out */,
  "bowler" TEXT /* Name of the bowler who took the wicket */,
  "fall_of_wicket_score" INTEGER /* Score at which the wicket fell */,
  "fall_of_wicket_over" INTEGER /* Over at which the wicket fell */,
  "inning_over" INTEGER /* Over number in the innings when the wicket fell */,
  "inning_ball" INTEGER /* Ball number in the over when the wicket fell */,
  "fielder" TEXT /* Name of the fielder involved in the wicket (if applicable) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the batsman before getting out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wicket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wickets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wickets_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_home_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the main sponsor of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_format" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the match format (e.g., Test, One-Day Internationals, Twenty20) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the match format */,
  "format_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the match format */,
  "format_rules" TEXT /* Brief description of the rules specific to the format */,
  "format_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the format (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_surface" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "venue_elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the venue */,
  "venue_climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions at the venue */,
  "venue_image" TEXT /* URL to the venue's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., by runs, by wickets) */,
  "result_method" TEXT /* Method of victory (e.g., all out, run chase) */,
  "result_man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Name of the player of the match */,
  "result_series_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the result on the series (e.g., series win, series loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
